title: marsdenia rotundifolia
intro: Marsdenia rotundifolia, also known as the Indian root or coral root, is a climbing plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Marsdenia rotundifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and lower fever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or powder for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions.
